widgets_values:
lora下载地址：

感谢B站大佬：[小志Jason](https://space.bilibili.com/443010)

**模型地址**
- [qwenedit-consistance-lora](https://civitai.com/models/1939453/qwenedit-consistance-lora)

**节点地址**
- [Comfyui-QwenEditUtils Repo](https://github.com/lrzjason/Comfyui-QwenEditUtils)

**采样器地址**
- [RES4LYF](https://github.com/ClownsharkBatwing/RES4LYF)
让图片1中的人物摆出图片2中的姿势，保持图片1中的人物一致性

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.
图中女人坐在铁艺栏杆上

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.
图1的模特穿着图2的衣服

Describe the key features of the input image (color, shape, size, texture, objects, background), then explain how the user's text instruction should alter or modify the image. Generate a new image that meets the user's requirements while maintaining consistency with the original input where appropriate.

如果姿势改变很变大，需要关闭志佬的LORA

如果需要保证图中人物/物体不偏移，就打开志佬的LORA

关闭只需CTRL+B即可
